sn35.150:1.1: "Bhikkhus, I will teach the way that is suitable for attaining Nibbāna. Listen to that …"What do you think, bhikkhus, is the eye permanent or impermanent?" …all as in §32…
sn35.150:15.1: "Seeing thus …sn.iv.136He understands: ‘ … there is no more for this state of being.’
sn35.150:15.2: "This, bhikkhus, is the way that is suitable for attaining Nibbāna."
